event: attended emergency room (ER) of IMC hospital in Jeddah
came to Saudi Arabia to perform Umrah
severe tenderness at right iliac fossa
no ova or parasites in stool
CT scan abdomen and pelvis without contrast
AAA arising above origins of both renal arteries
AAA measured 74 mm maximum sagittal diameter
aortic leak extending to right psoas muscle
aortic leak extending to right iliac fossa
good equal bilateral arterial pulsations in extremities
transferred to vascular surgery team at Alnoor Hospital
aneurysm extended from renal artery to iliac bifurcation
bifurcated silver-coated 20×10 mm Dacron graft applied
renal functions normalized by fifth postsurgical day
